entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: Is it ok to use req._query[$filter] in a cus...
entry.content:
When working with external services it is recommended to do this as described here ( in case of odata service 😞 https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#execute-queries 

In that case you can simply forward the query from the request to your external api. If you only want to take over the filters you can make a new query and take over the filter from the request by using “req.query.SELECT.WHERE”. If I’m not mistaken.

entry.title: Re: API is used for logging into SuccessFactors- Can this be migrated to IAS as 3rd party idp?
entry.content:
Yes, you can set up Grandid as a Corporate IDP in your IAS system. The following note outlines the exact architecture for your use case:

https://me.sap.com/notes/0002674264

entry.title: Re: Announcing Global Availability of the Content Generation Assistant in SAP Automation Pilot!
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake, 

Thank you! The feature is available exclusively on the standard plan for non-trial accounts only.

entry.title: How to configure SAP Fiori Launchpad on MacBook Pro?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m trying to configure the SAP Fiori Launchpad on my MacBook Pro (running macOS) but keep encountering an error message when opening it. I have followed the installation steps, but there might be specific configurations or adjustments required for macOS.

Has anyone faced a similar issue or could guide how to resolve this? Any troubleshooting steps or configuration settings that I might be missing?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Error when Importing Accounting Rules Engine Sample C...
entry.content:
Hi Grace,

When importing an environment with connected environment, you should import first the connected environment without activating it. Once you have successfully imported it, you can now import the Accounting Rules Engine sample and activate it.

When importing a target environment that is used in an “Environment” connection type, you need to use the Import Environment feature instead of the Import as New feature. This way, you avoid that the system generates a new technical ID of the target environment, and you preserve the environment connection.

Thanks and Best Regards,
Samantha

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud, embedded edition – the Way Ahead
entry.content: It would be nicer to know why SAP has decided to take out ESAC from btp? My understanding was SAP has given this as Fiori, a less costlier enterprise wide tool for s4 cloud customers for less complex reports. Now customers has to buy expensive Enterprise SAC license for business users? Thank you.

"Cannot upload the file Source data for CO - Profit center.xml. This file belongs to the migration object CO - Profit center". 

Can anyone help me with the possible reason?

entry.title: Re: How Can I Fix the "Active Entities Cannot Be Modified...
entry.content:
Can you try to use composition instead of association? I also think that you only have to enable draft for the root entity when using composition.

Definition Language (CDL) | capire (cloud.sap)

entry.title: Re: Customer field Not shown in ME21n and ME22N
entry.content:
Batch mgmt.  indicator not activated for SFG( HALB) Material type

So please maintain mandatory field for HALB Material type

we do have a similar challenge / requirement to change the tech users timezone. However we could not figure out the step you describe on how to log in with a technical user in C4C. Could you help ?

Oliver

entry.title: Re: Need Help Identifying the Best Processing Instruction...
entry.content:

I have prepared a document with more detailed information, including screenshots, to provide better context on the problem.

Unfortunately, I couldn't attach the Word document directly in the community post. Could you please let me know how I can send it to you? I'm happy to share it via email or any other method that works best for you.

entry.title: Re: Passing Filter parameter in bindElement of view

Could you please guide if we can pass non key field to the get entity method?

entry.title: Re: Step By Step Method To Create An Adobe Form With Dynamic Variables Along With An External Layout
entry.content:
Hi 

Good document and it will helpful if you could provide as 

Language translation dynamic based on login 

dynamically enables / disable layout and   digital signatures.

form templates with extensibility features...

entry.title: Branch Transfer
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We are currently working with a customer who wishes to implement the SAP Branch stock transfer functionality, including sales and purchase tax details. We successfully implemented similar functionality in SAP B1 and have managed to reconcile all accounts within a single branch.

However, we have encountered a challenge with the Customer/Vendor reconciliation. The customer does not want a payment option for internal transfers. As per standard SAP functionality, we cannot add journal entries between two branches, and internal reconciliation is not accommodating multi-branch scenarios.

Could you please advise on how we can address this issue? Any insights or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Below is the JE which SAP doesn't allow.

G/L Acct/BP Name

Debit

Credit

MP BP Master

INR 10,500.00

 

HO BP Master

 

INR 10,500.00

 

 

Sales From MP branch to HO

     

Delivery

    
     

G/L Acct/BP Code

G/L Acct/BP Name

Debit

Credit

Branch

512054

Branch Transfer - Sales/Purchase

INR 10,000.00

 

MP

131101

INVENTORY - RAW MATERIALS

 

INR 10,000.00

MP

     
     

AR Invoice

    
     

G/L Acct/BP Code

G/L Acct/BP Name

Debit

Credit

Branch

HO

HO BP Master

INR 10,500.00

 

MP

235698

IGST PAYABLE (5%)

 

INR 500.00

MP

512054

Branch Transfer - Sales/Purchase

 

INR 10,000.00

MP

 

 

Purchase on HO Branch

 

HO Branch

     

Purchase From MP To HO Branch (COGS & Inventory Amount is based on FIFO Method)

  
     

GRPO

    
     

G/L Acct/BP Code

G/L Acct/BP Name

Debit

Credit

Branch

131101

INVENTORY - RAW MATERIALS

INR 10,000.00

 

HO

512055

Branch Transfer - Sales/Purchase

INR 10,000.00

 

HO

512054

GOODS RECEIVED NOT INVOICED -Branch Transfer

 

INR 10,000.00

HO

512055

Branch Transfer - Sales/Purchase

 

INR 10,000.00

HO

     
     

Purchase

    
     

G/L Acct/BP Code

G/L Acct/BP Name

Debit

Credit

Branch

135697

IGST RECEIVABLE ( 5% )

INR 500.00

 

HO

512054

GOODS RECEIVED NOT INVOICED -Branch Transfer

INR 10,000.00

 

HO

MP Branch

MP BP Master

 

INR 10,500.00

HO

Regards,

Team IMTS

entry.title: Assistance to setup Cloud identity services
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am following a tutorial to setup cloud identity services. The tutorial link is given below.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-custom-ui-trust-cf..html

In the step 6 to Configure application's Default Identity Provider, there are some option are not available in my case.
First fig is from tutorial:Pic from Tutorial

And here in my case :

"YOUR COPORATE ID" option is miss.
Can anyone suggest how to get it.

entry.title: SAP GRC
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I took a career break and now again applying for jobs but i need hands on knowlegde about SAP GRC AC and Fiori security.

1) could anyone provide me the materials for real examples of GRC AC from projects 

2) Interview questions or any channel or guidance for interview preparation

3) if there is any intership or small project please let me know so that i can get help from it.

 

thanks

Gurpreet

entry.title: Changing the Negative Quota hours from 200 to 38 hrs
entry.content:
Hi All,

My business requirement is to change the Negative Quota hours permitted from 200 hrs to 38 hours effective 01.10.2024.

I have delimited the existing entry in table V_556A_B such that from 01.01.1900 to 30.09.2024 - the Negative hours permitted are 200. While from 01.10.2024 to 31.12.9999 - the negative hours permitted are 38.

The issue is the IT 2006 for the employees is still reflecting Negative 200 hrs.

Question - Is there a way that IT 2006 can be updated to reflect negative 38 hrs from 01.10.2024.

Note:

The existing employees already have IT 2006 with their respective balances reflected.

Kind Regards,

Jayanas

entry.title: Re: PL by Segment
entry.content:
Hi SonTran,

Thanks for your suggestion. But the Errors are same as previous.

entry.title: Re: Discover What's New in SAP CX AI Toolkit | Q3 Release
entry.content:
Hi Steven,

Thanks for the blog. We are just exploring the toolkit capabilities in which we are trying to get blob storage integration done, however, we are not able to get the clarity on how blob storage will work? and where to add Shared Access Signature (SAS) Url as in the help portal there is a not "Integration with existing Azure Blob Storage resources isn't supported. SAP CX AI Toolkit provides its own blob storage resource"

Help url Integrating Azure Blob Storage | SAP Help Portal

Any pointers with regards to this will be really helpful.

Regards,

Imran

entry.title: Re: How to add a calculated field to HCPR?
entry.content: Thanks, Savio!

entry.title: Re: No printout for FINT cancellation invoice
entry.content:
I don't think I can come up with an answer, but I still have a clarifying question.

You call it an interest invoice, but to my knowledge FINT is calculating interest and posting a interest document. Is this interest document the same as you call an interest invoice?

entry.title: Re: Negative Deduction config changes not impacting on ex...
entry.content:
Hello PratikMhatre

How did you manage to resolve the issue you had i.e. to have the IT 2006 reflecting the Negative Quota changes?

I have a similar issue - Business requirement was to change the Negative Quota from 200 hrs to 38 hrs.

I have update the table V_556A_B with negative 38 hours effective 01.10.2024.

This is not being reflected in IT 2006 yet. The employees already have Leave balances so I cannot change the IT 2006.

Thanks in advance for your assistance with this.

Kind Regards,

Jayanas

entry.title: SAP HANA Studio : standalone or eclipse plugin
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am wondering what is the better option to use SAP Hana studio. 

Shall I install it via eclipse as an add-on or install in standalone mode. I have read that SAP doesn't maintain anymore SAP HANA Studio standalone, is it true? Which solution is regularly updated and patch ?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Re: Passing Filter parameter in bindElement of view
entry.content: One option would be to make this field part of the key, another would be to use a header parameter: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/set-and-get-custom-http-header/ba-p/13222035

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Studio : standalone or eclipse plugin
entry.content: Nowadays, you should go for eclipse and install the plugins to have the latest version. This bring back HANA and ABAP into one IDE.

entry.title: Re: BODS Connectivity with Anaplan Data Hub
entry.content: Anaplan Data Hub is not supported by DS yet. If Anaplan Data Hub can provide Web Service function or Odata service for data extraction, you can create WS or Odata datastore in DS, then transfer data with it.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

Hope you are well!

I fall in the below two categories.

  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life.
  • People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

I'm 32 years old and I'm looking to switch my career to SAP SuccessFactors consultancy. However, I currently lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for myself.

I would request you and SAP to please provide me with the certification attempt as it will greatly help me with my career switch and improve my financial position.

entry.title: Updating Condition Data in SAP - Alternatives to MODIFY
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm experiencing performance issues when using the MODIFY statement to update a large number of records from an internal table. The process is taking a significant amount of time, and suggest me if there is any ways to us to modify table instead of modify keyword .

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
Re: Custom field in service entry sheet Fiori App
entry.content: Thanks for the reply. I identified ODATA servies already and all CDS's related with this application. There is no any CDS realated with that project ( SEGW ). There is no any CDS that could reflects/repreent type of type ( view that has to be changed ). During another tests I recognized that there is huge probability of UI5 modification for this view.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict JNL delivery document in open billing documents list for intra-state STO process
entry.content: Hello Experts, Could you please advise on this. Thank you, kind regards Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Error message "EDOCUMENT089" raised while processing India E-invoice.
entry.content:
I got the following solution this issue: applicable to cloud and only for India GST!

Refer to the notes: 3295815.

  1. Remove Assignments if made any from SSCUI 102187, 102188 and 102189 for Country IN. These are given by core framework and not Country India Localization Framework
    These need to be empty for Country India Localization Framework mandatorily. IN related eDocument Types needs to be removed.
    Please maintain the Assignments in the SSCUI 103585, 103586 and 103587. (Indian Framework) 

  2. Check if the view eDocument India: eInvoice Service Provider Details => SSUID 103588 GSP is maintained correctly.
    Check with your SCPI team on what value is maintained in SCPI iFlow configuration and maintain the same in the SSCUID 103588(eDocument India: eInvoice Service Provider Details)view.

  3. EDOFACTORYV(SSCUID 102637) - Activate Additional eDocument Instance Creation.

entry.title: Missing GL account long text
entry.content:
Hi All,

G/L Acct long text are missing for some G/L Account, I check the gl line item by using FBL3N.

Not sure it is caused by the initial migration task. As I found that there are some transactions created before the account's creation date. It is possible that create GL account by some mass creation tool, but the COA view will be missing.

for example the entry date for below document is 05.09.2023. But the time dependent description only valid from 04.10.2023. Even I try to add one more for 01.01.2023 , it still can't show the description in FBL3N.

entry.title: Re: Setup Approval Process for Sales Order in S4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Issue is already solved with custom logic.

thank you

entry.title: Re: Adaptation of SAP Standard Fiori App: Creating a custom button and displaying table data by usin
entry.content:
HI @23_Suman 

Make sure the path given in press event of button is correct.

It should look something like this:

press=".extension.<<Your_App_id>>.ListReportExtension.<<Method_name_in_controller>>"

entry.title: Re: Is there some release news in Community 2024? (fixes, improvements)
entry.content: @jerryjanda You're right, I don't see the delete option for this one. I can see the delete option on my other replies which don't contain any reply. Probably I didn't realize that before.

entry.title: Re: how to find existing smartform program driver
entry.content: The answer is here: https://www.google.com/search?q=how+to+find+existing+smartform+driver+program

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Studio : standalone or eclipse plugin
entry.content:
whatever the option, note that HANA Studio is deprecated.

For HANA Administration, you should use HANA Cockpit instead.
For HANA Development, you should use Business Application Studio instead.
See details in the following note https://me.sap.com/notes/2465027

entry.title: Re: Third Process SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hi 

Please see the blog It will help you 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/third-party-sales-process-in-sap-s-4-hana-system/ba-p/13571909

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/third-party-process-overview/ba-p/13031573

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Migration Cockpit internal numbering
entry.content:
Hello all, 

 

I am currently working on a migration project with the migration cockpit. What the customer has right now is internal numbering for all materials on a different system. What he needs is that we migrate the materials to S/4 with different internal numbering. I managed to find out that i can change the numbering from external to internal through the control parameters in the migration cockpit. Still it doesn't work out for me. Anyone has a clue how to fix this?

entry.title: Re: Passing Filter parameter in bindElement of view
entry.content:
Thank you. I couldn't make it as key field since the condition is not EQ and is taking values directly from CDS (BSP app) and impacts other functionality.

I will try the option with header parameters.

entry.title: SAP Hana error: Number XXX not defined for material type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm currently creating a new material for S4 Hana Cloud Public Edition, and i received such error from the system

After searching through various Q&A questions in the community, I come to realize the material master number range has to be setup and associate the number range to the material type.

However, there is no way to find the transaction MMNR in the Flori UI, and in the Central Business Configuration, there's no way to find the option "Element/*Group" to assign the number range interval.

May i ask where the assignment can be found in the configuration for SAP S4 Hana Cloud CBC?

Thank you for the help.

Best Regards,

Dan

entry.title: Re: Annotation for Industry-Specific Colors (Indication Colors) available?
entry.content:
Dear customer,

SAP Fiori elements does not support the Industry-specific colors yet, only the semantic ones.

Please raise an enhancement request using https://influence.sap.com/ .

Kind regards.

Gwendal.

entry.title: Calendar Week Handling in User Settings in S/4 HANA 2023 FPS1
entry.content:
It appears that with SAP S/4HANA 2024 FPS1 (Fiori 2023), the Calendar Week Handling in User Settings allows users to choose their preferred date display format in calendars.
Currently, the default option for week numbering is enabled for users. Please let us know if the ISO 8601 setting can be activated for all users to prevent them from having to change this setting on their end.

entry.title: Re: Metadata for AR (Article Master)
entry.content: Thanks Mark, for sharing the information

entry.title: Re: update values in table /GRCPI/GRIA_CON
entry.content: The table is maintained in customizing, SPRO / Governance, Risk and Compliance (Plug-In) / Access Control / Maintain Plug-In Configuration Settings.

entry.title: Re: Third Process SAP S4/HANA
entry.content: Thank you so much for your prompt response!

entry.title: Re: Banner/Background Image uploading access to employee
entry.content:
Hi Katie,

Thank you for your response.

I want to clarify that our requirement is to restrict employees from uploading any images other than those available in the library. We don’t want to completely remove access for employees; we just want to ensure they can only use the existing images.

If we follow the steps you suggested, it seems we would be removing access altogether, which isn’t our intention.

Could we discuss alternative solutions that allow restricted uploads while still providing access to the library?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: I've wanted to become SAP certified since the beginning of this journey because it's a globally recognized and industry-leading platform. However, budgetary constraints have always been a key impediment to achieving this goal. As someone who believes in equal access to education for all, regardless of financial circumstances, the opportunity to take the SAP exam for free is certainly once in a lifetime for me. I have no doubt that earning the SAP certification will hasten my professional development and bring up fascinating job opportunities for this aging immigrant.

entry.title: Re: Adaptation of SAP Standard Fiori App: Creating a custom button and displaying table data by usin
entry.content:
Hello @Sugandha_Gupta 

Thanks for replying.

Why "ListReportExtension" is used? I followed naming path like: 

press=".extension.<<Your_App_id>>.<<Controller Name>>.<<Method_name_in_controller>>"

I also attached the screenshot for your reference. Please check and help me regarding this.

entry.title: How to identify deprecated (OData) API's?
entry.content:
Hello guys,

we are looking for an automated way to check for deprecated API's? How can a consumer, or we as the S/4 team detect a new deprecation of the API?

We don't want to create yet another excel with all API's that are used and then check manually for any changes, we are looking for an automated notification process.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: More Flexible Conditions to Trigger a Workflow
entry.content:
Thank you for your valuable information.
I immediately added the above code to  Custom Logic using it as a reference, but an error occurs at the part shown in the screen shot.
I understand that the above code is a sample code and may not be usable as is, but I would like to know how to modify it if possible...

entry.title: Remote Service-Dynamic Header Passing in API Calls from custom handler in SAP CAP java
entry.content:
I am working on a remote service and trying to access the price service (getPrice API) from the cart service. I want to pass the header from the cart service to the price service. While it can be easily done through the application.properties file, that approach is static. I would like to pass the header dynamically.
 @Autowired
    private PriceService pService;
 
    @Autowired
    private ParameterInfo parameterInfo;
 @On()
    public void addToCart(AddToCartContext context) {
        String currencyCode = parameterInfo.getHeader("currency");
        String countryIso = parameterInfo.getHeader("countryIso");
 
In the code above, I am receiving the header when calling the cart API. I am modifying the header
 
context.getCdsRuntime().requestContext()
        .modifyParameters(param -> param.setHeaders(headerMap))
        .run(newContext -> {
        System.out.println("132" + newContext.getParameterInfo().getHeaders());
        return this.pService.getPrice(productId, quantity);
 
I also tried to get it from the price service using HttpServletRequest, but I did not receive the header from it. When I tried using application.properties, I was able to retrieve it from the price service.
cds.remote.services.PriceService.http.headers.countryIso = IN
cds.remote.services.PriceService.http.headers.currency= INR
 
However, I have a question about how to pass the header dynamically to Price api.
Please guide me to achieve it? 
It would be of great help.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: I want to have an app like CNMASSCREATE in S4 HANA Pr...
entry.content: Thanks Ken. So in such a case an app can be created, if the app does not exist?

entry.title: Re: Linear Data not getting saved when creating Equipment via IE01
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have got a similar issue wrt Mplan. 

The linear data is not getting retained when we save the new maintenance plan.

During creation the linear data appears in the Mplan, but right after saving it is getting wiped off.

and also could you please shed more light on Table key on this context would be helpful.

Looking forward to your reply, thanks.

entry.title: Re: Workflow for Deactivation/Deletion of Technical Objects(Equipments/Functional Locations)
entry.content:
Hi, I have one question,

For notification: When a technical object is deactivated or deleted, the workflow determines if there are any maintenance notifications that are not yet completed and have this technical object assigned on header level. If so, the workflow creates a work item for the agent responsible. These work items show up in the workflow inbox of the employee who deactivated the technical object. 

But I am using SAP S/4 HANA 2022 and for the activities for send email to agent, I don't see activity for sending the email. I only see the below option. Can you tell me where I can find it??

Thanks,

Shweta Gupta

entry.title: Changing Configuration for Site Profile after Sites have gone live
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to change the configuration for Plant/Site Profiles in Retail. This is to allow a Vendor to be created as part of the Business Partner (this is S4). My concern is, as Sites are already live and trading, is this dangerous? I have only ever changed the configuration for Site Profiles BEFORE a go live.

I can find no SAP documentation saying this is dangerous to do, however I'd like to know if anybody has experience. Theoretically I am guessing it should be OK because businesses can change to require intercompany STOs which necessitates a Vendor.

Many Thanks

Regards Steve

entry.title: Re: Custom field in service entry sheet Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

Maybe you can reverse engineering this. Check out in the browser which odata (cds) calls are made (filter in Network tab on 'opu'). Now you can see which odata service is being used.

 

At the gateway go to /n/iwfnd/maint_service and check the odata service. I am sure you know what to do now (SEGW), since I am a frontend developer 😛

Hope this helps.

 

Noël

entry.title: Cost Accounting Summary Report in SAP Business One
entry.content:
There were some questions regarding how to work with cost accounting in SAP Business One (B1), and that motivated me to write this blog. First of all there is some information in  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/179c4757670a4c6586f3adf431bd412b.html.

Secondly, let’s try to define what is required for the cost accounting? You can find many different definitions for that on the internet. I choose the following one:

Cost accounting involves assigning costs to cost objects that can include a company's products, services, and any business activities. Cost accounting is helpful because it can identify where a company is spending its money, how much it earns, and where money is being lost.

So, as you can see, this is not a legal requirement to have the cost accounting, but it’s mainly used for the managerial accounting.

Once we are clear with the definition, let’s take a closer look at how you can define and work with that in B1. Under the Cost objects we use Cost Centre and under the Cost accounting we use Cost Accounting Reports.

This blog is related to the second part – cost accounting reports and I will dedicate it to the Cost Accounting Summary Report:

It can be that you may not see the Dimension dropdown list in your B1. Don’t worry, it means that you did not enable the dimensions under your Cost Accounting setup under the General Settings in Administration -> System Initialization:

You can see in this screen that once you have decided to use Multidimensions you cannot go back.

But let us go back to the report.

You can run the report with your own Cost Centres Hierarchy or using Cost Centres. I have defined the Cost Centres Hierarchy as following:

 And now have the following result:

In case you do not have a complex cost accounting structure you can use Cost Centre button. In the same data base with the same selection criteria, I have the following result:

 As you can see, the result is the same. However, the presentation is different. You can also print out the result using the system print layout or your own.

With the other filters like Project, GL Accounts, Add Journal Vouchers, Exclude Closing Balances JEs you can play with the results to understand your company situation and plan your activities to have the financial result better.

Display in Report part is common for both report presentations and is used in the other SAP Business One financial and accounting reports. However, if you run SAP Business One in the location with different currency displaying data in System currency can help you compare the results of different business locations.

This is an overview of the possibilities to use this functionality in SAP Business One. It should help to adopt your B1 to your business model to be effective.
In case you have used the functionality, I would like to ask you to share your feedback or thoughts in a comment or ask questions in the Q&A tag area.

entry.title: Re: How to provision user identities into Concur using Identity Provisioning
entry.content:
New link to Concur Guide:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CONCUR/83c94f03f949423a8f76158375832747/1b925e2f6caf10148b97b230c1b3e173.html?q=IDP&locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: MDX Statement
entry.content: Hello Savio

that is the scenario that we are already testing for the IDOC convertion.

Renato

entry.title: Order to cash process and configuration in SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can anyone help me with the Order to cash process and configuration in SAP S4/HANA.

Thanking in Advance!

entry.title: how to call response collection entity from sap fiori
entry.content:
Hello,

We are uploading Excel data to backend via Function import, in Fiori side via Batch call we are sending payload data.

oModel.callFunction("/uploadBudgetInfo", {
method: "POST",
batchGroupId: "batchFunctionImport",
urlParameters: testUrlParam[i],
changeSetId: "test",
});

oModel.submitChanges({
batchGroupId: "batchFunctionImport", //Same as the batch group id used previously
success: function (oData,response) {
var res = oData;
}.bind(this),
error: function (oError) {
var err = oError;
}
});

But we are getting BatchResponse with 1 collection returntype - cds_zwbsbudget_release.ZD_UPLOADBUDGET_LOG as below - 

Function import in Metadata as below,

<FunctionImport Name="uploadBudgetInfo" ReturnType="Collection(cds_zwbsbudget_release.ZD_UPLOADBUDGET_LOG)" m:HttpMethod="POST" sap:action-for="cds_zwbsbudget_release.BudgetType" sap:applicable-path="uploadBudgetInfo_ac">
<Parameter Name="objnr" Type="Edm.String" Mode="In" MaxLength="22" sap:label="Object Number"/>
<Parameter Name="Amount" Type="Edm.String" Mode="In" Nullable="true"/>
<Parameter Name="Currency" Type="Edm.String" Mode="In" MaxLength="5" Nullable="true" sap:label="Transaction Currency"/>
<Parameter Name="status" Type="Edm.String" Mode="In" MaxLength="1" Nullable="true"/>
<Parameter Name="msg_txt" Type="Edm.String" Mode="In" Nullable="true"/>
</FunctionImport>

Please let me know how can I get response data from cds_zwbsbudget_release.ZD_UPLOADBUDGET_LOG, as per ABAP team log is storing inside this.

We are using BAS project and OData V2 service using ABAP RAP.

entry.title: Re: Banner/Background Image uploading access to employee
entry.content:
Hi SatishPanda

This configuration will allow you to do exactly what you are trying to achieve. This is how we have our instance configured as our aim was the same as yours - allow users to change their background image but prevent them from being able to upload their own images and only allow them to select from "approved" images that we have provided.

They will retain this option:

But will only be able to select from the images that you have enabled in "Manage background image library", like this:

Thanks

Katie

entry.title: Re: ABAP Tools for Clean ABAP
entry.content:
Hi @ Former Member, 

happy to hear that you like ABAP cleaner – and good news: as you can see from the release notes for version 1.19.1, ABAP cleaner now supports formatting of CDS Views (i.e. Data Definition Language) with 21 new cleanup rules 🙂. Just open your CDS View in ABAP Development Tools and press Ctrl + 4.

Kind regards,
Jörg-Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Production Order Creation Fails Due to Invali...
entry.content:
I've solved by calling the API via HTTP, pay attention to CSRF validation and etag header.

This guide helped me a lot: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/csrf-token-validation-failed/qaq-p/12524895

entry.title: SAP Singapore Localization Forum 2024
entry.content:
Join us on November 8, 2024, at the SAP Singapore Office for the SAP Singapore Localization Forum 2024!

We are thrilled to invite our valued customers and partners to this exclusive event, where you will have the opportunity to discover the latest advancements in SAP's localization solutions tailored specifically for the Singapore market. This forum also offers a platform to network with industry peers and engage with SAP experts. Don't miss this chance to elevate your understanding and connections within the industry!

Agenda at a glance:

  • SAP Generative AI-Powered Localization
  • Singapore InvoiceNow
  • Singapore Statutory Update
  • SAP HCM Payroll Reporting Initiative
  • HCM Legal Compliance Update

Explore the agenda and register for the event!

entry.title: I was new to SAP BTP and wanted to learn kyma please invite me kyma slack channel
entry.content: Kyma slack channel invite needed

entry.title: How to calculate the Freight(FC) in Landed Cost? (SAP B1)
entry.content:
How to calculate the Freight(FC) in Landed Cost? (SAP B1)? I am trying to find the formula of this freight (FC)

 i try to calculate using base doc price * total factor / 100 but seems wrong. Any one can help?

entry.title: OData V4 - Max number of parallel requests
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using OData V4 to extract data from SAP S4/HANA on a daily basis. We have created a batch mechanism with $top & $skip to parallelize OData data extraction queries and we would like to know if there is a maximum number of parallel OData V4 queries for an application account.

If so, what parameter should be modified to increase the threshold?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG Replication - Apply Object Filter Criteria by default
entry.content: We have the same request - it should somehow be possible to default this to "X" - otherwise users always make mistakes and forget to filter.

entry.title: Re: Unable to locate b1s_sqltable.conf
entry.content:
"b1s_sqltable.conf" file are located on this path

C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One ServerTools\ServiceLayer\Conf\

Best Regards Eric Martin

entry.title: Getting 502 error on SAP MDK Web Application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on MDK application in CF environment (in Business application Studio) and try to run it on Local Dev Space and also deployed on Cloud foundry and getting 502 Bad Gateway in Local Dev space and 500 Internal Server Error in Cloud foundry.

entry.title: Restoring Sap Hana cloud instance using a database backup file
entry.content:
Hello experts 

i have a backup file of  a database of a particular SAP BTP trial account now  i wants to restore this database over Sap Hana cloud instance in a new SAP BTP trial account .

i have explored Sap community to find solution and guidance .

in that journey i got some articles and tutorials.

 

 1.)  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/clone-sap-hana-database-instance-via-template-based-cloning/ba-p/13617031

This tutorial help us to clone SAP HANA database instance via template based cloning.

but this guidance only helps me to clone SAP HANA database instance  within same trial account .

2.)  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/hana-database-explorer-import-catalog-objects-in-hdi-container/qaq-p/12235488

This guidance material helps me to import catalog objects in HDI container.

again ,this solution is limited within single trial account because we can only import and export SAP  HDI(Hana deployment infrastructure) Container for copy purposes within single trial account.

Both tutorial covers cloning Hana cloud instance and importing and exporting HDI container  but both are limited within single SAP BTP trial account and i wants to restore Database over sap Hana cloud instance using database back up file of different trial account.

 

@thomas_jung @qmacro , @MioYasutake ,@gregorw, please help me How to restore database over SAP HANA cloud instance using backup file of a database.

entry.title: Re: Unable to locate b1s_sqltable.conf
entry.content: Hi Eric, there is no b1s_sqltable.conf in the path. Please see screenshot https://imgur.com/a/PebBzkJ

entry.title: Re: fiscal representative concept-Intrastat
entry.content: Thanks a lot, I will check and update you.

entry.title: Re: Unable to locate b1s_sqltable.conf
entry.content:
Hi,

In my computer i do find "b1s_sqltable.conf" on that Path, you can see it on this screenshot
https://imgur.com/a/YVVUhL9

Unfortunately, i'm not sure why that file is not located on your computer, I think it has something to do with the service layer installation in the first hand.
although i'm not really sure maybe you can try to re-install the service layer
or
Maybe this reference can help you, to try restart service layer services
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_ADMIN_GUIDE_SQL/f6fb230cc90949d8b66586a39189992b/aa39bad786344848968994a42f6578e3.html

entry.title: Re: Accessing On-Premises HTTP APIs with SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hello Felix,
Thank you for detailed step-by-step guidance for establishing connection.
We are working exactly on the same solution reaching on-prem system from BTP account. We use OAuth authentication for reaching on-prem system's endpoint.
Unfortunately, we faced an issue ''Error: [exchangeToken] Error on content received....".
Did you possibly face the same issue? Any ideas on what we could set wrong in the destination?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I hope this message finds you well.

I am reaching out because I cannot find my screen name for my application. I have completed all the steps in the Beginner Corner, but I'm unsure where to locate the screen name.

To assist you further, I will share a screenshot of my progress in the Beginner Corner. Could you please help me identify which part contains the screen name?

Thank you for your help with this issue.

Best regards,
Baskar K

entry.title: Re: Asset Manager and HR integration
entry.content: Hello Remko, Did you find anything on this topics? If yes, can you please share

entry.title: How to generate a value for a specific selection of a cell in a table
entry.content:
Hi,

Can some one help me to find a way to filter the dimensions by selecting a cell in the table, considering the below example we have two models. Model 1 and Model 2 , there are two tables in a story on selection of model 1 table  we should fetch that specific combination and a pop up should appear for the selection of scenario dimension which is specifically present in model 2 ,After selecting the scenario , value 1 should generate for the selections.

       
MODEL 1    Amount 
 AccountCost CenterProfit CenterProduct  
 KPI1CC1PC1P1  
 KPI2CC2PC2P2  
       
       
       
       
MODEL 2     Amount
 Accountcost centerprofit centerproductScenario 
 KPI1CC1PC1P1S11
 KPI1CC1PC1P1S21

entry.title: Re: CDS view for production order configuration data
entry.content:
Hello @snigdhodeep 

 

Please use the app Classification/Configuration CDS Views - Generate Analytical Views

The note https://me.sap.com/notes/2490167 contains a guide how to generate these views

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Access a cataloge hosted on SAP CX
entry.content:
Hello

I'm looking for infomation, how to access a cataloge from a S4/HANA 2023 system. The cataloge is hosted on a SAP CX system.
I've been told, that CX does not offer an OCI interface.

Has somebody setup such a direct connection?
Is there some kind of documentation how this can be realized?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: How to generate a value for a specific selection of a cell in a table
entry.content: in popup scenario will an input control

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start - Deactivate button
entry.content:
Hi,

We use SAP Mobile Start in combination with SAP BTP Build Work Zone. We are also using the notifications within SAP Mobile Start.

So if a new item arrives, the end user will receive a notification in SAP Mobile Start. They then click on the notification and see a so called "first screen". There is a reject (afwijzen) button on this first screen as you can see in de picture.

Does anyone know how I could deactivate this button? It should not be visible to the end user.

Best regards,

Gene

entry.title: Re: SAP API Logging - Log Error Message using Custom Charts
entry.content: Very helpful blog.

entry.title: Croatian fiscalization FI documents, business place and the fiscal number not determined
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

In our S4H Public Cloud system, we have configured Croatian fiscalization for FI documents, but the business place and the fiscal number are not being determined. The source for this data is the charging device, which is correctly identified in the document. Additionally, when creating an invoice from the SD module for the same charging device, the business place and the fiscal number are determined correctly. Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue?

 

Best regards,

Axians

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content: "Hi @David_Chaviano ! Thanks for letting me know, but I haven't received the invite yet. Could you please check on it or resend it when convenient? Looking forward to joining. Thanks!"

entry.title: Re: Unable to locate b1s_sqltable.conf
entry.content: Hi, Thank you for your reply. I tried to search in the file explorer but i'm getting no file found. I hope someone can guide. Thank you

entry.title: Re: mrp transaction md61
entry.content:
Hello rahulpandhare11,

This Error means that the Req Class VSFB (in OMPO) Isn't Linked to a Req Type (in OMP1)

Solution: Create a new entry to be linked in OMP1.

Best Regards,
Mohammed Abbas

entry.title: Re: FBD1 posting - Recurring GL entries: Function module or BAPI for posting
entry.content: Hi there, I would be also interested in an example how the function module "POST_DOCUMENT" can be used to create recurring entries. We are looking for a way to handle our many recurring entries. Currently we use Batch-Input to create FBD1 recurring entries, but we would like to replace Batch-Input... and didn't find a good solution so far 😞 Could anyone please push us into the right direction? Thanks a lot and best wishes, Thomas

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud – September 2024
entry.content: @susenpoppe Great thanks for the video, that helps a lot. Is it a requirement, that SAP HANA Cloud is hosted on the same hyperscaler and on the same datacenter as the EC2 instance in that example from the video?

entry.title: Just registered
entry.content: Can someone guide me how to take the SAP AI courses.

entry.title: Re: Customer use case of Embedded SAC: how to create custom SAC story and the dashboard in S/4HANA C
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created KPI reports as a tile. Now, I have to create story dashboard with multiple CDS analytical views in this Manage KPI application. But, I am also not getting Create option in Story to create it similar to sfospina comments. Kindly help me how to build this connection with on Premise system via BTP cloud connector? I searched most blogs, but nothing helped.
One more questions - Can i build story board a tile with multiple/different analytical KPI in same board and publish like a tile in Fiori launchpad like overview page?

Thanks, Soumya R
